category_sources: Official Haivision/srt README describes SRT as a transport protocol for low-latency live video/audio streaming and bulk data transfer.
display_name_sources: Official SRT Alliance and Haivision repository use SRT / Secure Reliable Transport.
docs_sources: Official Haivision/srt README links to GitHub documentation with API documents and feature descriptions.
source_facts.homepage is the official SRT Alliance site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Haivision/srt, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Haivision README describes low-latency live video/audio streaming, UDP transport, reliability, and AES encryption.
source_facts.executables include srt-live-transmit, srt-file-transmit, and srt-tunnel.
